query:
CREATE TABLE `bonus_credits` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `credits` int NOT NULL,
  `reason` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `bonus_credits_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `referrals` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `referrerId` int NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
  `referredUserId` int,
  `bonusAwarded` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `redeemedAt` timestamp,
  CONSTRAINT `referrals_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `referrals_code_unique` UNIQUE(`code`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2VJemZSZ3ks3bBp.05e6da88e31f --database gWqCGEfQHjyCZk9AmeraCf --execute CREATE TABLE `bonus_credits` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `credits` int NOT NULL,
  `reason` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `bonus_credits_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `referrals` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `referrerId` int NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
  `referredUserId` int,
  `bonusAwarded` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `redeemedAt` timestamp,
  CONSTRAINT `referrals_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `referrals_code_unique` UNIQUE(`code`)
);
